'''Doornik-207''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located witnin the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The planet was colonized by the [[Corasgh]], settled under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. However, it was wiped out by the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]], whereupon the Yevetha colonized the world.
